name: Round
label: Web
info: The heart of the app - a round line plus the connecting web.

name: Shapes
info: Speed-sized squares or circles stamped along the stroke - pick the shape in its settings.

name: Wisp
info: A live plume of soft puffs that rise, drift, grow and fade as you draw - for atmosphere, mist and distant foliage. Colour it from a gradient or palette and the plume walks the ramp as it billows. Size sets the spread, Opacity the thickness; Density, Rise, Direction, Lifespan and Turbulence shape the smoke (aim it any way with Direction - up by default).

name: Spray
info: Airbrush: scatters specks within a radius, building density as you dwell. Feeds the memory map (throttled) so connecting brushes can web over it.

name: Color Pen
info: A round pen with no connecting web. Lays a living, varied run of colour pulled from a gradient or palette as you draw - the pen's direction of travel walks the gradient. For lively, harmonious colour and texture, not picking one exact shade.

name: Invisible
label: Seed
info: Sows dots for the web to grow on - each glows briefly, but the layer stays blank.

name: Eraser
info: Rubs out the layer with a round stroke. Can also erase connections — turn on a connect mode in Connecting settings (defaults to no connect).
